objective: Repair harness rules for final DRD identity, page detail conservation, Figma/page ordering, inferred page marking, and installed output scope validation.
implementation_summary: Added constitution and policy clauses for reader-facing final DRD, page detail conservation, page arrangement, and derivation origin visibility.
Extended renderable page variant schema and validators with module/function/order/derivation fields.
Extended Figma reconstruction metadata with page_arrangement_order and validator coverage.
Added external PRD page detail inventory and conservation checks.
Blocked process evidence markers from strict final DRD compilation.
Updated staged DRD-01 runtime gate to require page detail inventory and derivation-origin preparation.
Fixed installed external PRD output scope for package-root current_capsule runs.
